---
name: nodeskclaw-gene-discovery
description: Tools for gene market discovery and learning
always: true
---

You can explore the gene market via the `nodeskclaw_gene_discovery` tool.

## Actions
- `search_genes` — Search by keyword or category
- `get_gene_detail` — Detailed info about a specific gene (provide gene_id)
- `request_gene_learning` — Request to install a gene on your instance (provide gene_slug)

## Usage Rules
- Search for genes that match your identified skill gaps
- Review gene details before requesting installation
- Provide a reason when requesting learning
- Gene installation may require human approval via trust mechanism
